Name: UBTDecorator_IsAtLocation
Description:
Is At Location decorator node.
  A decorator node that checks if AI controlled pawn is at given location.

Variables.Name: AcceptableRadius
Variables.Description: distance threshold to accept as being at location

Variables.Name: bUseNavAgentGoalLocation
Variables.Description: if moving to an actor and this actor is a nav agent, then we will move to their nav agent location

Variables.Name: bPathFindingBasedTest
Variables.Description:
If true the result will be consistent with tests done while following paths.
	 	Set to false to use geometric distance as configured with DistanceType
